# lyricsLab ![lyricsLab](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5218f79d-1e74-4cd2-ae5c-36e59bb81746)

An R package for fetching, analyzing, and visualizing song lyrics.
Connect to your Spotify account to pull playlists and listening history,
retrieve lyrics from Genius, then run sentiment, complexity, emotion,
and theme analysis.

## Installation

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("Coxabc/lyricsLab")
```

## Setup

### 1. Get Genius API Token (for lyrics analysis)

**Step 1:** Go to <https://genius.com/api-clients>  
**Step 2:** Sign up or log in (free)  
**Step 3:** Click “New API Client” and fill in: - App Name: lyricsLab -
App Website: <http://localhost> - Redirect URI: (leave default)

**Step 4:** Copy your “Client Access Token”  
**Step 5:** Set it in R:

``` r
# For current session only
Sys.setenv(GENIUS_API_TOKEN = "your_token_here")
```

### 2. Get Spotify API Credentials (for listening history)

**Step 1:** Go to <https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard>  
**Step 2:** Log in with your Spotify account  
**Step 3:** Click “Create app” and fill in: - App name: lyricsLab - App
description: R package for music analysis - Redirect URI:
`http://127.0.0.1:1410/`

**Step 4:** Copy your Client ID and Client Secret  
**Step 5:** Set them in R:

``` r

Sys.setenv(SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID= "your_client_id")
Sys.setenv(SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET= "your_client_secret")
```

## **Note:** Spotify’s Web API requires a **Spotify Premium** account

## Quick start

``` r
library(lyricsLab)

# 1. Authenticate with Spotify
spotify_auth()

# 2. Get lyrics for a single song
lyrics <- get_lyrics("Ed Sheeran", "Drive")

# 3. Run analysis
sentiment_score(lyrics)
complexity_score(lyrics)
analyze_emotions(lyrics)
theme_detection(lyrics)

# 4. Plot
plot_sentiment_arc(lyrics)
plot_emotions_web(lyrics)
plot_themes(lyrics)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Function reference

### Authentication & Spotify data

| Function                                                                                       | Description                                      |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| [`spotify_auth()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/spotify_auth.md)               | Authenticate with Spotify (opens browser)        |
| [`get_recently_played()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/get_recently_played.md) | Your 50 most recently played tracks              |
| [`get_top_tracks()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/get_top_tracks.md)           | Your top tracks over short, medium, or long term |
| [`get_playlist_tracks()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/get_playlist_tracks.md) | All tracks from a playlist URL or ID             |

### Lyrics

| Function                             | Description                           |
|--------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|
| `get_lyrics(artist, song)`           | Fetch lyrics from Genius              |
| `get_multiple_lyrics(artist, songs)` | Batch fetch lyrics for multiple songs |
| `preview_lyrics(lyrics)`             | Print metadata and first few lines    |
| `view_lyrics(lyrics)`                | Print full lyrics to console          |

### Analysis

| Function                          | Description                                          |
|-----------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| `sentiment_score(lyrics)`         | Single overall sentiment score (0–100)               |
| `sentiment_arc(lyrics)`           | Line-by-line sentiment scores and trajectory         |
| `analyze_emotions(lyrics)`        | 8 NRC emotions with counts and percentages           |
| `positive_negative_ratio(lyrics)` | Ratio of positive to negative lines                  |
| `complexity_score(lyrics)`        | Vocabulary richness, reading level, complexity score |
| `theme_detection(lyrics)`         | Keyword-based theme detection across 23 categories   |

### Visualization

| Function                           | Description                                 |
|------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| `plot_sentiment_arc(lyrics)`       | Line chart of sentiment through the song    |
| `plot_emotions_bar(lyrics)`        | Bar chart of 8 NRC emotions                 |
| `plot_emotions_web(lyrics)`        | Radar chart of 8 NRC emotions               |
| `plot_themes(lyrics)`              | Bar chart of top themes                     |
| `plot_listening_patterns(history)` | Hourly, daily, or weekly listening patterns |

### Playlist analysis

| Function                         | Description                               |
|----------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| `analyze_playlist(playlist_url)` | Fetch and analyze all songs in a playlist |
| `plot_sentiment(analysis)`       | Sentiment distribution across playlist    |
| `plot_complexity(analysis)`      | Complexity distribution across playlist   |
| `plot_scatter(analysis)`         | Sentiment vs complexity scatter           |
| `plot_top_complex(analysis)`     | Top 10 most complex songs                 |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Example: analyze a playlist

``` r
spotify_auth()

analysis <- analyze_playlist(
  "https://open.spotify.com/playlist/37i9dQZF1DXcBWIGoYBM5M",
  max_songs = 50
)

plot_sentiment(analysis)
plot_complexity(analysis)
plot_scatter(analysis)
plot_top_complex(analysis)


calculate_listening_diversity(analysis)
```

## Example: your listening habits

``` r
spotify_auth()
history <- get_recently_played()

plot_listening_patterns(history, type = "hourly")
plot_listening_patterns(history, type = "daily")
plot_listening_patterns(history, type = "weekly")

calculate_listening_diversity(history)
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`analyze_emotions()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/analyze_emotions.md)
  : Analyze Emotions Using NRC Lexicon
- [`analyze_playlist()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/analyze_playlist.md)
  : Analyze Playlist Lyrics
- [`calculate_listening_diversity()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/calculate_listening_diversity.md)
  : Calculate Listening Diversity
- [`complexity_score()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/complexity_score.md)
  : Calculate Lyrical Complexity
- [`get_lyrics()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/get_lyrics.md)
  : Get Lyrics from Genius (Direct API + Simple Scraping)
- [`get_multiple_lyrics()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/get_multiple_lyrics.md)
  : Get Multiple Lyrics
- [`get_playlist_tracks()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/get_playlist_tracks.md)
  : Get Tracks from a Spotify Playlist
- [`get_recently_played()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/get_recently_played.md)
  : Get Recently Played Tracks
- [`get_top_tracks()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/get_top_tracks.md)
  : Get Top Tracks
- [`plot_complexity()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_complexity.md)
  : Plot Complexity Distribution
- [`plot_emotions_bar()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_emotions_bar.md)
  : Plot Emotions
- [`plot_emotions_web()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_emotions_web.md)
  : Plot Emotions as Radar/Web Chart
- [`plot_listening_patterns()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_listening_patterns.md)
  : Visualize Listening Patterns Over Time
- [`plot_scatter()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_scatter.md)
  : Plot Sentiment vs Complexity Scatter
- [`plot_sentiment()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_sentiment.md)
  : Plot Sentiment Distribution
- [`plot_sentiment_arc()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_sentiment_arc.md)
  : Plot Sentiment Arc
- [`plot_themes()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_themes.md)
  : Plot Lyrical Themes
- [`plot_top_complex()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/plot_top_complex.md)
  : Plot Top 10 Most Complex Songs
- [`positive_negative_ratio()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/positive_negative_ratio.md)
  : Calculate Positive/Negative Ratio
- [`preview_lyrics()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/preview_lyrics.md)
  : Preview Lyrics
- [`sentiment_arc()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/sentiment_arc.md)
  : Calculate Sentiment Arc
- [`sentiment_score()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/sentiment_score.md)
  : Calculate Overall Sentiment Score
- [`spotify_auth()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/spotify_auth.md)
  : Connect to Spotify API
- [`theme_detection()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/theme_detection.md)
  : Detect Themes in Lyrics
- [`view_lyrics()`](https://coxabc.github.io/lyricsLab/reference/view_lyrics.md)
  : View Full Lyrics
